title: HoloNet News (original website)
content:
{{Top|rwm|italics=1}}
{{Youmay|the HoloNet News website|other meanings, see [[HoloNet News (disambiguation)]]}}
[[File:HN_N.png|right]]
'''HoloNet News''' was an official ''[[Star Wars]]'' website that was created as part of the marketing campaign for the [[2002]] theatrical release of [[Star Wars: Episode II Attack of the Clones|''Star Wars'': Episode II ''Attack of the Clones'']]. The site consisted of various in-universe news articles detailing [[The galaxy/Legends|galactic]] events leading up to the beginning of the film.

In addition to coverage of major events with a clear bearing on what occurs in ''Attack of the Clones'', the site includes a number of articles that tie into other elements of the [[Star Wars Legends|Expanded Universe]]. Many of the articles also contain numerous in-jokes and other obscure references. In addition to being available as a website on the internet, the contents of the site was was said to have been archived and released as DVD-ROM content on disc one of the 2002 DVD release of ''Attack of the Clones''.<ref name="HomingBeacon">{{HBCite|73}}</ref> No such feature was ever included however.

The site and its articles were authored by [[Pablo Hidalgo]] and [[Paul Ens]], with illustrations by [[Joe Corroney]].

In [[October]] [[2013]], the HoloNet News website was shut down and its contents were redirected to [[StarWars.com]].

==Contents==
Twelve issues were published, all of which were part of volume 531. Each issue and article is given an in-universe date based on the [[Great ReSynchronization]] dating system.

HoloNetNews.com is divided into seven subsections:
*News
*[[Business]]
*[[Regional]]
*[[Jedi Watch]]
*[[Sports]]
*[[Life (HoloNet News segment)|Life]]
*Archive

In addition, one section allowed for a five-day Weather Forecast based on a six digit planet code that was entered. The link will produce a random weather page regardless of the digits or even if no numbers are entered. High and low temperatures and weather graphics would display, alongside a written report that would detail problems and warnings such as coronal flaring that could end in mass unicellular extinctions, recommendations of EM shielding, seismic shifting, or [[Frog rain|frog showers]].

==Media==
===Issues===
*[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 45|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #45'']] — [[February 28]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN45 date">Per {{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}, [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] was released on [[March 14]], [[2002]]. As [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] segments were published weekly, and {{Hnn|45||A Closer Look}} was published two issues prior, it must have been released on [[February 28]] of the same year.</ref>
*[[HoloNet News Vol. 531 46|''HoloNet News Vol. 531 #46'']] — [[March 7]], [[2002]]<ref name="HNN46 date">Per {{JCFCite|url=posts/6042498|board=Literature|thread=The Official HoloNetNews Discussion Thread|user=IAmTheDarkSide|date=2002-03-14|time=5:40 PM|archiveurl=https://web.archive.org/web/20220914072556/https://boards.theforce.net/threads/the-official-holonetnews-discussion-thread.5990764/page-4#post-6042498}}, [[HoloNet News Vol. 531 47|''HoloNet News Vol. 531'' #47]] was released on [[March 14]], [[2002]]. As [[HoloNet News (original website)|HoloNet News]] segments were published weekly, and {{Hnn|46|jediwatch/1337_1.html|Jedi Refuse to Hand Over Baby Ludi}} was published in the issue immediately preceding the forty-seventh edition, it must have been released on [[March 7]] of the same year.</ref>

==Legacy==
The site was replaced with entries of [[HoloNet News (Insider)|Republic HoloNet News]] in [[Star Wars Insider 65|''Star Wars Insider'' 65]].

On October 3, 2008, StarWars.com began continuing HoloNet News in an [[HoloNet News (podcast)|audio format]], designed to follow the events of ''The Clone Wars'' TV series.<ref name="All Hear">{{SWArchive|url=theclonewars/hnn/001.html#rss|text=HoloNet News — A Galaxy Divided|int=HoloNet News — A Galaxy Divided}}</ref>
